summary: Completed frontend testing for iteration 15: Commission info block in business registration form. Fixed missing Badge import. All 6 features tested and passed.

fixed.issue: Missing Badge component import - would cause runtime error when commission block renders

passed_tests: Frontend: Navigate to Step 4 successfully after filling Steps 1-3
Frontend: Commission info block (data-testid='commission-info-block') is NOT visible when 'No requiero anticipo' is selected (default)
Frontend: Commission info block IS visible when 'Requiero anticipo' is selected
Frontend: Commission block shows all 3 deposit options - 'Depósito cada 3 días (10%)', 'Depósito quincenal (8%)', 'Depósito mensual (4%)'
Frontend: Commission block is hidden again when switching back to 'No requiero anticipo'
Frontend: Home page (/) loads correctly with hero section and search
Frontend: Search page (/search) loads correctly with filters and business listings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 tested the new commission info block feature. Key data-testids: commission-info-block (visible only inside option-with-deposit when selected). The block displays 3 deposit schedule options with their respective fees (10%, 8%, 4%). A bug was fixed: Badge component was not imported but was being used - import added. App URL: https://reserve-stripe-test.preview.emergentagent.com

fix_applied.issue: Badge component used but not imported
fix_applied.fix: Added import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'; after the Card import
